name: small HR teams in accounting firms processing 5–15 payrolls/month tool
description: For small HR teams in accounting firms processing 5–15 payrolls/month, manual tracking causes late filings. We automate payroll tax filings instead of manual tracking and filing of payroll taxes.
target_audience: small HR teams in accounting firms processing 5–15 payrolls/month
problem_solved: Timely payroll tax filings and reminders
